appraisal_events.evidence: « … la seule ambition mondaine … fut justement celle dont la réalisation se trouva lui être interdite, et par un veto si absolu que Swann mourut sans supposer que la duchesse pourrait jamais les connaître. »
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator insists on the absolute prohibition of the presentation of Odette and especially of Gilberte to the Duchess, marking a social exclusion and a failure of Swann's sole worldly ambition.

status_effects.explanation: His single social objective for his wife and his daughter is blocked by a veto, indicating an exclusion from the targeted elite.
